Who I Am

About Me

I am a final-year Bachelor of Commerce student at Sri Vidya Mandir College of Arts and Science, Salem. My academic focus lies in accounting, taxation, and financial management — areas I've had the opportunity to explore practically through my internship at a CA firm.

During my internship at CA V.S. Varadharajan's office, I worked on real-world tasks including PAN card processing, GST filing procedures, client record management using MS Excel, and organizing financial documents.

I am seeking opportunities in accounting, taxation, and finance roles where I can apply my analytical skills and continue growing as a finance professional.

Academic Research

Study Projects

01
E-Commerce · Consumer Behaviour

A Study on Consumer Satisfaction on Meesho Online Shopping with Special Reference to Salem

Analysed consumer satisfaction levels among Meesho shoppers in Salem, examining product quality, delivery experience, pricing, and return policies.

02
Automobile · Customer Service

A Study on Customer Service to Tata Motors Products with Special Reference to Salem

Evaluated after-sales customer service quality of Tata Motors dealerships in Salem, focusing on responsiveness and satisfaction outcomes.

03
Technology · Sustainability

A Study on Impact of Advent of Technology in Human Sustainability Shopping with Special Reference to Salem

Investigated how digital payments and e-commerce platforms influence sustainable shopping behaviour among consumers in Salem.

04
FMCG · Brand Satisfaction

A Study on Customer Satisfaction Towards Aachi Masala with Reference to Namakkal Town

Assessed customer satisfaction and brand loyalty towards Aachi Masala products among households in Namakkal Town.
